title: rubus × hypomallus
intro: Rubus × hypomallus, also known as a hybrid blackberry or raspberry, is a cross between a blackberry (Rubus allegheniensis) and a raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × hypomallus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
